name: RUZ.T
description: A battered, inferior version of the TAYZ.T that patrols the hedge around Ominent installations. It is still lethal early on, but clearly the weakest lab robot.
respawnInfo: It does not respawn once destroyed.
specialTraits: It always drops its Gold Card once every RUZ.T in the world has been defeated. It is immune to bleed, gas hazard, poison, and venom.

attacks.name: Hit
attacks.tell: It steps in with its taser arm for a short direct strike.
attacks.howToAvoid: Block it head-on or backstep when the arm comes up.

attacks.name: 3-Combo Hit
attacks.tell: It spins through several short strikes in sequence.
attacks.howToAvoid: Do not punish the first motion; wait for the full sequence to end.
attacks.notes: The whole combo counts as busting damage.

attacks.name: Charged Jab
attacks.tell: It charges electricity into its arm before a longer jab.
attacks.howToAvoid: Sidestep it or perfect-block before contact.
attacks.notes: Its strongest hit and the only one that also adds shock.

behavior: It patrols hedge labs and outposts, sounding its sirens when it detects threats. It follows the same base style as the TAYZ.T: constant melee pressure with a more dangerous charged jab.
interactionWithPlayer: It is hostile on sight and chases the player through its patrol route. It has no special gimmick beyond steady pressure and the electrical sting on its charged jab.
interactionWithCreatures: It attacks any creature that intrudes into the lab, but cooperates with ARC.R and TAYZ.T freely.
strategy: An early hammer is enough to dismantle it quickly. Its attacks are fairly blockable, so the biggest mistake is letting several robots box you in at once.
